case_title: JINMY VASQUEZ GODOY VS. PETER JUNIOR RIVERA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GODOY, JINMY VASQUEZ AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, PETER JUNIOR ,AN INDIVIDUAL DBA EPIC CONTRACTOR JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GODOY, JINMY VASQUEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIVERA, PETER JUNIOR ,AN INDIVIDUAL DBA EPIC CONTRACTOR $8,640.27 PRINCIPAL, $606.38 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,471.65, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
